{"parentUuid":"6472f703-2d30-449b-9576-4a5d9d4d4ce4","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→export interface DataPoint {
     2→	date: string;
     3→	value: number;
     4→}
     5→
     6→export function calculateRollingAverage(
     7→	data: number[],
     8→	window: number,
     9→): (number | null)[] {
    10→	if (!data || data.length === 0) return [];
    11→
    12→	const result: (number | null)[] = [];
    13→
    14→	for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    15→		if (i < window - 1) {
    16→			result.push(null);
    17→		} else {
    18→			let sum = 0;
    19→			for (let j = i - window + 1; j <= i; j++) {
    20→				sum += data[j];
    21→			}
    22→			result.push(sum / window);
    23→		}
    24→	}
    25→
    26→	return result;
    27→}
    28→
    29→export function calculateWeekOverWeek(
    30→	currentWeekData: number[],
    31→	previousWeekData: number[],
    32→): number {
    33→	if (!currentWeekData.length || !previousWeekData.length) return 0;
    34→
    35→	const currentSum = currentWeekData.reduce((sum, val) => sum + val, 0);
    36→	const previousSum = previousWeekData.reduce((sum, val) => sum + val, 0);
    37→
    38→	if (previousSum === 0) return currentSum > 0 ? 100 : 0;
    39→
    40→	return ((currentSum - previousSum) / previousSum) * 100;
    41→}
    42→
    43→export function detectAnomalies(
    44→	data: number[],
    45→	threshold: number = 50,
    46→): boolean[] {
    47→	if (!data || data.length < 2) return data.map(() => false);
    48→
    49→	const result: boolean[] = [false];
    50→
    51→	for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
    52→		const current = data[i];
    53→		const previous = data[i - 1];
    54→
    55→		if (previous === 0) {
    56→			result.push(current > 0);
    57→			continue;
    58→		}
    59→
    60→		const percentChange = Math.abs(((current - previous) / previous) * 100);
    61→		result.push(percentChange > threshold);
    62→	}
    63→
    64→	return result;
    65→}
    66→
    67→export function getTrendDirection(data: number[]): "up" | "down" | "stable" {
    68→	if (!data || data.length < 2) return "stable";
    69→
    70→	const firstHalf = data.slice(0, Math.floor(data.length / 2));
    71→	const lastHalf = data.slice(Math.floor(data.length / 2));
    72→
    73→	const firstAvg =
    74→		firstHalf.reduce((sum, val) => sum + val, 0) / firstHalf.length;
    75→	const lastAvg = lastHalf.reduce((sum, val) => sum + val, 0) / lastHalf.length;
    76→
    77→	const percentChange = ((lastAvg - firstAvg) / firstAvg) * 100;
    78→
    79→	if (Math.abs(percentChange) < 5) return "stable";
    80→	return percentChange > 0 ? "up" : "down";
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function getTrendIcon(direction: "up" | "down" | "stable"): string {
    84→	switch (direction) {
    85→		case "up":
    86→			return "\u2191";
    87→		case "down":
    88→			return "\u2193";
    89→		case "stable":
    90→			return "\u2192";
    91→	}
    92→}
    93→
    94→export function getTrendColor(
    95→	direction: "up" | "down" | "stable",
    96→	isPositiveGood: boolean = true,
    97→): string {
    98→	if (direction === "stable") return "text-gray-500";
    99→
   100→	const isGood = isPositiveGood ? direction === "up" : direction === "down";
   101→	return isGood ? "text-green-600" : "text-red-600";
   102→}
   103→
   104→export function formatWoWChange(percentage: number): string {
   105→	const sign = percentage >= 0 ? "+" : "";
   106→	return `${sign}${percentage.toFixed(1)}%`;
   107→}
   108→
   109→export function calculateStats(data: number[]): {
   110→	mean: number;
   111→	median: number;
   112→	stdDev: number;
   113→	min: number;
   114→	max: number;
   115→} {
   116→	if (!data || data.length === 0) {
   117→		return { mean: 0, median: 0, stdDev: 0, min: 0, max: 0 };
   118→	}
   119→
   120→	const sorted = [...data].sort((a, b) => a - b);
   121→	const mean = data.reduce((sum, val) => sum + val, 0) / data.length;
   122→	const median = sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length / 2)];
   123→
   124→	const variance =
   125→		data.reduce((sum, val) => sum + (val - mean) ** 2, 0) / data.length;
   126→	const stdDev = Math.sqrt(variance);
   127→
   128→	return {
   129→		mean,
   130→		median,
   131→		stdDev,
   132→		min: sorted[0],
   133→		max: sorted[sorted.length - 1],
   134→	};
   135→}
   136→"}]},"uuid":"54bb051c-b14a-481f-9d15-56ed93f777a8","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:25:55.957Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"6472f703-2d30-449b-9576-4a5d9d4d4ce4"}

{"parentUuid":"74c8a8bb-db0c-4dde-b6f8-51bcb8ecbd9f","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"progress","data":{"type":"hook_progress","hookEvent":"PostToolUse","hookName":"PostToolUse:Read","command":"callback"},"parentToolUseID":"REDACTED","toolUseID":"REDACTED","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:26:01.679Z","uuid":"b7e8437c-00be-4ef9-a901-a67eb2781e3e"}
{"parentUuid":"74c8a8bb-db0c-4dde-b6f8-51bcb8ecbd9f","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
     2→import type { ConversationEntry } from "@/lib/conversation-schema";
     3→import { parseConversations } from "@/lib/conversation-schema";
     4→import { isSlashCommandMessage } from "@/lib/parse-slash-command";
     5→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     6→import { ConversationMessage } from "./ConversationMessage";
     7→import type { TokenDataPoint } from "./TokenUsageChart";
     8→import type { ToolActivityPoint } from "./ToolActivityChart";
     9→
    10→interface ConversationViewProps {
    11→	content: string;
    12→	className?: string;
    13→	scrollContainerRef?: React.RefObject<HTMLElement | null>;
    14→	onActiveMessageChange?: (messageIndex: number) => void;
    15→	onTokenDataReady?: (data: TokenDataPoint[], totalMessages: number) => void;
    16→	onToolActivityReady?: (data: ToolActivityPoint[]) => void;
    17→	scrollToMessageIndex?: number | null;
    18→}
    19→
    20→/** Extract token usage data from parsed conversations */
    21→function extractTokenData(entries: ConversationEntry[]): TokenDataPoint[] {
    22→	const points: TokenDataPoint[] = [];
    23→
    24→	for (let i = 0; i < entries.length; i++) {
    25→		const entry = entries[i] as ConversationEntry;
    26→		const entryAny = entry as Record<string, unknown>;
    27→
    28→		if (
    29→			("role" in entry && entry.role === "assistant") ||
    30→			("type" in entry && entryAny.type === "assistant")
    31→		) {
    32→			const message = entryAny.message as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
    33→			const usage = message?.usage as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
    34→
    35→			if (usage) {
    36→				points.push({
    37→					messageIndex: i,
    38→					inputTokens: (usage.input_tokens as number) || 0,
    39→					outputTokens: (usage.output_tokens as number) || 0,
    40→				});
    41→			}
    42→		}
    43→	}
    44→
    45→	return points;
    46→}
    47→
    48→/** Extract tool, skill, and subagent activity from parsed conversations */
    49→function extractToolActivity(
    50→	entries: ConversationEntry[],
    51→): ToolActivityPoint[] {
    52→	const points: ToolActivityPoint[] = [];
    53→
    54→	for (let i = 0; i < entries.length; i++) {
    55→		const entry = entries[i] as ConversationEntry;
    56→		const entryAny = entry as Record<string, unknown>;
    57→
    58→		const isUser =
    59→			("role" in entry && entry.role === "user") ||
    60→			("type" in entry && entryAny.type === "user");
    61→
    62→		const isAssistant =
    63→			("role" in entry && entry.role === "assistant") ||
    64→			("type" in entry && entryAny.type === "assistant");
    65→
    66→		// User messages with toolUseResult → tool invocation result
    67→		if (isUser && entryAny.toolUseResult != null) {
    68→			const toolResult = entryAny.toolUseResult as Record<string, unknown>;
    69→			const toolType = (toolResult.type as string) || "tool";
    70→
    71→			const hasNonZeroExit =
    72→				typeof toolResult.code === "number" && toolResult.code !== 0;
    73→			const hasStderr =
    74→				typeof toolResult.stderr === "string" && toolResult.stderr.length > 0;
    75→			const wasInterrupted = toolResult.interrupted === true;
    76→
    77→			const content =
    78→				(entryAny.message as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.content ||
    79→				entryAny.content;
    80→			const contentHasError =
    81→				Array.isArray(content) &&
    82→				content.some((item: Record<string, unknown>) => item?.is_error);
    83→
    84→			const isError =
    85→				hasNonZeroExit || hasStderr || wasInterrupted || contentHasError;
    86→
    87→			// Check if this is a subagent (Task tool)
    88→			if (toolType === "Task") {
    89→				points.push({
    90→					messageIndex: i,
    91→					category: "subagent",
    92→					name: toolType,
    93→					isError,
    94→				});
    95→			} else {
    96→				points.push({
    97→					messageIndex: i,
    98→					category: "tool",
    99→					name: toolType,
   100→					isError,
   101→				});
   102→			}
   103→		}
   104→
   105→		// User messages with slash command content → skill
   106→		if (isUser) {
   107→			const content =
   108→				(entryAny.message as Record<string, unknown> | undefined)?.content ||
   109→				entryAny.content ||
   110→				entryAny.text ||
   111→				"";
   112→			if (typeof content === "string" && isSlashCommandMessage(content)) {
   113→				points.push({
   114→					messageIndex: i,
   115→					category: "skill",
   116→					name: "slash-command",
   117→					isError: false,
   118→				});
   119→			}
   120→		}
   121→
   122→		// Assistant messages — scan content for tool_use items to capture Task/subagent launches
   123→		if (isAssistant) {
   124→			const message = entryAny.message as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
   125→			const content = (message?.content || entryAny.content) as
   126→				| unknown[]
   127→				| undefined;
   128→
   129→			if (Array.isArray(content)) {
   130→				for (const block of content) {
   131→					const b = block as Record<string, unknown>;
   132→					if (b?.type === "tool_use" && b?.name === "Task") {
   133→						const input = b.input as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
   134→						points.push({
   135→							messageIndex: i,
   136→							category: "subagent",
   137→							name: (input?.subagent_type as string) || "Task",
   138→							isError: false,
   139→						});
   140→					}
   141→				}
   142→			}
   143→		}
   144→	}
   145→
   146→	return points;
   147→}
   148→
   149→export function ConversationView({
   150→	content,
   151→	className,
   152→	scrollContainerRef,
   153→	onActiveMessageChange,
   154→	onTokenDataReady,
   155→	onToolActivityReady,
   156→	scrollToMessageIndex,
   157→}: ConversationViewProps) {
   158→	const [conversations, setConversations] = useState<ConversationEntry[]>([]);
   159→	const [parseError, setParseError] = useState<string | null>(null);
   160→	const messageRefsMap = useRef<Map<number, HTMLDivElement>>(new Map());
   161→	const observerRef = useRef<IntersectionObserver | null>(null);
   162→
   163→	// Parse content
   164→	useEffect(() => {
   165→		if (!content || content.trim() === "") {
   166→			setConversations([]);
   167→			return;
   168→		}
   169→
   170→		try {
   171→			const lines = content.split("\n").filter((line) => line.trim() !== "");
   172→
   173→			const parsed = parseConversations(content);
   174→
   175→			if (parsed.length === 0 && lines.length > 0) {
   176→				try {
   177→					JSON.parse(lines[0] as string);
   178→					setParseError(
   179→						`Failed to parse ${lines.length} conversation entries. Check console for details.`,
   180→					);
   181→				} catch {
   182→					setParseError("Content is not valid JSONL format");
   183→				}
   184→			}
   185→
   186→			setConversations(parsed);
   187→
   188→			if (parsed.length > 0) {
   189→				if (onTokenDataReady) {
   190→					const tokenData = extractTokenData(parsed);
   191→					onTokenDataReady(tokenData, parsed.length);
   192→				}
   193→				if (onToolActivityReady) {
   194→					const activityData = extractToolActivity(parsed);
   195→					onToolActivityReady(activityData);
   196→				}
   197→			}
   198→		} catch (error) {
   199→			console.error("[ConversationView] Error parsing conversations:", error);
   200→			setParseError(error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error");
   201→		}
   202→	}, [content, onTokenDataReady, onToolActivityReady]);
   203→
   204→	// Set up IntersectionObserver for scroll tracking
   205→	useEffect(() => {
   206→		if (!onActiveMessageChange) return;
   207→
   208→		const root = scrollContainerRef?.current || null;
   209→
   210→		observerRef.current = new IntersectionObserver(
   211→			(entries) => {
   212→				let topmostIndex = -1;
   213→				let topmostTop = Infinity;
   214→
   215→				for (const ioEntry of entries) {
   216→					if (ioEntry.isIntersecting) {
   217→						const idx = Number(
   218→							ioEntry.target.getAttribute("data-message-index"),
   219→						);
   220→						if (
   221→							!Number.isNaN(idx) &&
   222→							ioEntry.boundingClientRect.top < topmostTop
   223→						) {
   224→							topmostTop = ioEntry.boundingClientRect.top;
   225→							topmostIndex = idx;
   226→						}
   227→					}
   228→				}
   229→
   230→				if (topmostIndex >= 0) {
   231→					onActiveMessageChange(topmostIndex);
   232→				}
   233→			},
   234→			{
   235→				root,
   236→				rootMargin: "0px 0px -80% 0px",
   237→				threshold: 0,
   238→			},
   239→		);
   240→
   241→		for (const [, el] of messageRefsMap.current) {
   242→			observerRef.current.observe(el);
   243→		}
   244→
   245→		return () => {
   246→			observerRef.current?.disconnect();
   247→		};
   248→	}, [onActiveMessageChange, scrollContainerRef]);
   249→
   250→	// Scroll to message when scrollToMessageIndex changes
   251→	useEffect(() => {
   252→		if (scrollToMessageIndex == null) return;
   253→
   254→		const el = messageRefsMap.current.get(scrollToMessageIndex);
   255→		if (el) {
   256→			el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
   257→		}
   258→	}, [scrollToMessageIndex]);
   259→
   260→	const registerMessageRef = useCallback(
   261→		(index: number, el: HTMLDivElement | null) => {
   262→			if (el) {
   263→				messageRefsMap.current.set(index, el);
   264→				observerRef.current?.observe(el);
   265→			} else {
   266→				const existing = messageRefsMap.current.get(index);
   267→				if (existing) {
   268→					observerRef.current?.unobserve(existing);
   269→				}
   270→				messageRefsMap.current.delete(index);
   271→			}
   272→		},
   273→		[],
   274→	);
   275→
   276→	if (parseError) {
   277→		return (
   278→			<div className={cn("py-8 text-center", className)}>
   279→				<p className="text-red-600 dark:text-red-400 font-semibold mb-2">
   280→					Error parsing conversation data
   281→				</p>
   282→				<p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">{parseError}</p>
   283→			</div>
   284→		);
   285→	}
   286→
   287→	if (conversations.length === 0) {
   288→		return (
   289→			<div className={cn("py-8 text-center", className)}>
   290→				<p className="text-muted-foreground">No conversation data available</p>
   291→			</div>
   292→		);
   293→	}
   294→
   295→	const conversationMessages = conversations.filter((entry) => {
   296→		if ("role" in entry) return true;
   297→		if ("type" in entry) {
   298→			const type = (entry as Record<string, unknown>).type;
   299→			return type === "user" || type === "assistant" || type === "system";
   300→		}
   301→		return false;
   302→	});
   303→
   304→	const metadataEntries = conversations.filter((entry) => {
   305→		if ("type" in entry) {
   306→			const type = (entry as Record<string, unknown>).type;
   307→			return (
   308→				type === "file-history-snapshot" ||
   309→				type === "progress" ||
   310→				type === "queue-operation"
   311→			);
   312→		}
   313→		return false;
   314→	});
   315→
   316→	return (
   317→		<div className={cn("space-y-6", className)}>
   318→			<div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mb-4">
   319→				Showing {conversationMessages.length} messages
   320→				{metadataEntries.length > 0 &&
   321→					` (${metadataEntries.length} metadata entries hidden)`}
   322→			</div>
   323→			{conversations.map((entry, idx) => (
   324→				<div
   325→					// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noArrayIndexKey: stable conversation order
   326→					key={idx}
   327→					ref={(el) => registerMessageRef(idx, el)}
   328→					data-message-index={idx}
   329→				>
   330→					<ConversationMessage entry={entry} messageIndex={idx} />
   331→				</div>
   332→			))}
   333→		</div>
   334→	);

    18→interface ConversationMessageProps {

    23→
    24→const variantStyles = {

    40→} as const;
    41→
    42→/** Collapsed row for tool results, system, and meta entries */
    43→function CollapsedEntry({
    44→	icon: Icon,
    45→	label,
    46→	summary,
    47→	children,
    48→	anchorId,
    49→	className,
    50→	variant = "default",
    51→}: {
    52→	icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>;

    59→}) {

    89→	);
    90→}
    91→
    92→/** Extract a short summary from content for the collapsed label */
    93→function contentSummary(content: unknown): string {
    94→	if (typeof content === "string") {
    95→		return content.slice(0, 100);
    96→	}
    97→	if (Array.isArray(content)) {
    98→		const first = content[0] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
    99→		if (first?.type === "tool_result") {
   100→			const text =
   101→				typeof first.content === "string"
   102→					? first.content
   103→					: JSON.stringify(first.content);
   104→			return `tool_result: ${text.slice(0, 80)}`;
   105→		}
   106→		if (first?.type === "text" && first?.text) {
   107→			return String(first.text).slice(0, 100);
   108→		}
   109→	}
   110→	return "";

   113→export function ConversationMessage({

   158→
   159→	// Handle system entries (role-based)

   169→			>

   173→			</CollapsedEntry>
   174→		);
   175→	}
   176→
   177→	// Handle user messages (both role-based and type-based)
   178→	const isUserMessage =
   179→		("role" in entry && entry.role === "user") ||
   180→		("type" in entry && (entry as Record<string, unknown>).type === "user");
   181→
   182→	if (isUserMessage) {
   183→		const entryAny = entry as Record<string, unknown>;
   184→

   188→			entryAny.content ||
   189→			entryAny.text ||
   190→			"";

   192→		// Tool result entries — collapsed with wrench icon
   193→		if (entryAny.toolUseResult != null) {

   195→			const toolType = (toolResult.type as string) || "tool";

   200→			const hasStderr =

   209→			return (
   210→				<CollapsedEntry
   211→					icon={Wrench}

   299→							{slashCommandInfo.commandName && (

   301→									<span className="font-semibold">Command:</span>{" "}
   302→									<code className="bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 rounded">

   305→								</div>
   306→							)}
   307→							{slashCommandInfo.commandArgs && (
   308→								<div className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
   309→									<span className="font-semibold">Args:</span>{" "}
   310→									<code className="bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
   311→										{slashCommandInfo.commandArgs}

   315→						</div>
   316→					) : (

   318→					)}
   319→				</div>
   320→			</div>
   321→		);
   322→	}
   323→
   324→	// Handle assistant messages (both role-based and type-based)
   325→	const isAssistantMessage =

   327→		("type" in entry &&

   338→		return (

   364→	// Handle system messages (type-based)

{"parentUuid":"7752c291-5c30-41a2-af4a-85b9057e30ca","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import type {

    11→
    12→interface MessageContentProps {
    13→	content: string | Content[];
    14→	className?: string;
    15→}
    16→
    17→// Parse code blocks from text content
    18→function parseTextContent(
    19→	text: string,
    20→): Array<{ type: "text" | "code"; content: string; language?: string }> {
    21→	const parts: Array<{
    22→		type: "text" | "code";
    23→		content: string;
    24→		language?: string;
    25→	}> = [];
    26→
    27→	// Match code blocks with language specifier: ```language\ncode\n```
    28→	const codeBlockRegex = /```(\w+)?\n([\s\S]*?)```/g;
    29→	let lastIndex = 0;
    30→	let match: RegExpExecArray | null = codeBlockRegex.exec(text);
    31→
    32→	while (match !== null) {
    33→		// Add text before code block
    34→		if (match.index > lastIndex) {
    35→			const textContent = text.slice(lastIndex, match.index).trim();
    36→			if (textContent) {
    37→				parts.push({ type: "text", content: textContent });
    38→			}
    39→		}
    40→
    41→		// Add code block
    42→		const language = match[1] || "text";
    43→		const code = match[2] as string;
    44→		parts.push({ type: "code", content: code, language });
    45→
    46→		lastIndex = match.index + match[0].length;
    47→		match = codeBlockRegex.exec(text);
    48→	}
    49→
    50→	// Add remaining text
    51→	if (lastIndex < text.length) {
    52→		const textContent = text.slice(lastIndex).trim();
    53→		if (textContent) {
    54→			parts.push({ type: "text", content: textContent });
    55→		}
    56→	}
    57→
    58→	// If no code blocks found, return the whole text
    59→	if (parts.length === 0 && text.trim()) {
    60→		parts.push({ type: "text", content: text.trim() });
    61→	}
    62→
    63→	return parts;
    64→}
    65→
    66→export function MessageContent({ content, className }: MessageContentProps) {
    67→	// Handle undefined or null content
    68→	if (!content) {

    95→						>

    97→								{part.content}
    98→							</p>
    99→						</div>
   100→					),
   101→				)}
   102→			</div>
   103→		);
   104→	}
   105→
   106→	// Handle non-array content (shouldn't happen, but be safe)
   107→	if (!Array.isArray(content)) {

   109→			<div className={cn("text-muted-foreground text-sm italic", className)}>

   130→			{content.map((block, idx) => {

   155→										>

   157→												{part.content}
   158→											</p>
   159→										</div>

   161→								)}
   162→							</div>
   163→						);
   164→					}
   165→
   166→					case "thinking": {
   167→						const thinkingBlock = block as ThinkingContent;
   168→						return (
   169→							<div

   171→								key={idx}

   173→							>

   175→									Internal Thinking

   178→									{thinkingBlock.thinking}
   179→								</p>
   180→							</div>
   181→						);
   182→					}
   183→
   184→					case "tool_use": {

   206→					case "tool_result": {

     6→interface ToolInvocationProps {

     8→	input: Record<string, unknown>;
     9→	result?: {

    15→
    16→export function ToolInvocation({
    17→	toolName,
    18→	input,

    21→}: ToolInvocationProps) {
    22→	const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(false);
    23→
    24→	// Format input for display

    26→		const keys = Object.keys(input);
    27→		if (keys.length === 0) return "No parameters";
    28→
    29→		const important = keys.slice(0, 2);
    30→		const summary = important
    31→			.map((key) => {
    32→				const value = input[key];
    33→				if (typeof value === "string" && value.length > 50) {
    34→					return `${key}: "${value.slice(0, 50)}..."`;
    35→				}
    36→				if (typeof value === "string") {
    37→					return `${key}: "${value}"`;
    38→				}
    39→				return `${key}: ${JSON.stringify(value)}`;
    40→			})
    41→			.join(", ");
    42→
    43→		return keys.length > 2 ? `${summary}, +${keys.length - 2} more` : summary;
    44→	};
    45→
    46→	// Format result content
    47→	const getResultContent = (): string => {
    48→		if (!result) return "";
    49→
    50→		if (typeof result.content === "string") {
    51→			return result.content;

    53→

    59→

    80→			>
    81→				{isExpanded ? (
    82→					<ChevronDown className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground flex-shrink-0" />
    83→				) : (
    84→					<ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground flex-shrink-0" />
    85→				)}
    86→				{isError ? (
    87→					<AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-500 flex-shrink-0" />
    88→				) : (
    89→					<Terminal className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0" />
    90→				)}
    91→				<span
    92→					className={cn(
    93→						"font-mono text-sm font-semibold",
    94→						isError ? "text-red-700 dark:text-red-300" : "text-foreground",
    95→					)}
    96→				>
    97→					{toolName}
    98→				</span>
    99→				<span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate flex-1">
   100→					{formatInput()}
   101→				</span>
   102→			</button>
   103→
   104→			{isExpanded && (
   105→				<div className="px-4 pb-4 space-y-3">
   106→					{/* Tool Input */}
   107→					<div>
   108→						<h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground mb-2">

   110→						</h4>
   111→						<CodeBlock code={JSON.stringify(input, null, 2)} language="json" />

   113→
   114→					{/* Tool Result */}
   115→					{hasResult && (
   116→						<div>
   117→							<h4
   118→								className={cn(
   119→									"text-xs font-semibold mb-2",
   120→									isError
   121→										? "text-red-700 dark:text-red-300"
   122→										: "text-muted-foreground",
   123→								)}

   136→						</div>
   137→					)}
   138→				</div>
   139→			)}
   140→		</div>
   141→	);
   142→}
   143→"}]},"uuid":"bbf2fe0e-b9bb-4dee-8acc-89602a0229b8","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:26:03.429Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"567e3751-45e9-4440-8e4f-e53f71732ecb"}

{"parentUuid":"86ee868a-fd2f-4d18-a5e1-84504fda0a32","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"progress","data":{"type":"hook_progress","hookEvent":"PostToolUse","hookName":"PostToolUse:Read","command":"callback"},"parentToolUseID":"REDACTED","toolUseID":"REDACTED","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:26:04.038Z","uuid":"19ccb21b-9f57-4076-8e3a-3c0c9ca3fbc1"}
{"parentUuid":"86ee868a-fd2f-4d18-a5e1-84504fda0a32","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
     2→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     3→
     4→export interface TokenDataPoint {
     5→	messageIndex: number;
     6→	inputTokens: number;
     7→	outputTokens: number;
     8→}
     9→
    10→interface TokenUsageChartProps {
    11→	data: TokenDataPoint[];
    12→	totalMessages: number;
    13→	activeMessageIndex: number;
    14→	onClickMessage: (messageIndex: number) => void;
    15→	className?: string;
    16→}
    17→
    18→const CHART_HEIGHT = 160;
    19→const AXIS_Y = CHART_HEIGHT / 2;
    20→const BAR_HALF_HEIGHT = AXIS_Y - 4;
    21→const LEFT_MARGIN = 40; // pixels for Y-axis labels
    22→
    23→function formatTokenCount(n: number): string {
    24→	if (n >= 1_000_000) return `${(n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
    25→	if (n >= 1_000) return `${(n / 1_000).toFixed(0)}k`;
    26→	return String(n);
    27→}
    28→
    29→export function TokenUsageChart({
    30→	data,
    31→	totalMessages,
    32→	activeMessageIndex,
    33→	onClickMessage,
    34→	className,
    35→}: TokenUsageChartProps) {
    36→	const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    37→	const [chartWidth, setChartWidth] = useState(400);
    38→
    39→	useEffect(() => {
    40→		const el = containerRef.current;
    41→		if (!el) return;
    42→		const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
    43→			const entry = entries[0];
    44→			if (entry) setChartWidth(entry.contentRect.width);
    45→		});
    46→		observer.observe(el);
    47→		return () => observer.disconnect();
    48→	}, []);
    49→
    50→	const drawWidth = chartWidth - LEFT_MARGIN;
    51→
    52→	const { maxInput, maxOutput } = useMemo(() => {
    53→		let maxIn = 0;
    54→		let maxOut = 0;
    55→		for (const d of data) {
    56→			if (d.inputTokens > maxIn) maxIn = d.inputTokens;
    57→			if (d.outputTokens > maxOut) maxOut = d.outputTokens;
    58→		}
    59→		return { maxInput: maxIn || 1, maxOutput: maxOut || 1 };
    60→	}, [data]);
    61→
    62→	const totalInput = useMemo(
    63→		() => data.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d.inputTokens, 0),
    64→		[data],
    65→	);
    66→	const totalOutput = useMemo(
    67→		() => data.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d.outputTokens, 0),
    68→		[data],
    69→	);
    70→
    71→	const handleClick = useCallback(
    72→		(e: React.MouseEvent<SVGSVGElement>) => {
    73→			if (totalMessages === 0) return;
    74→
    75→			const svg = e.currentTarget;
    76→			const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
    77→			const px = e.clientX - rect.left - LEFT_MARGIN;
    78→			const fraction = px / drawWidth;
    79→
    80→			let closest = data[0];
    81→			let closestDist = Infinity;
    82→			for (const d of data) {
    83→				const dx = Math.abs(d.messageIndex / totalMessages - fraction);
    84→				if (dx < closestDist) {
    85→					closestDist = dx;
    86→					closest = d;
    87→				}
    88→			}
    89→			if (closest) {
    90→				onClickMessage(closest.messageIndex);
    91→			}
    92→		},
    93→		[data, totalMessages, drawWidth, onClickMessage],
    94→	);
    95→
    96→	if (data.length === 0) {
    97→		return (
    98→			<div className={cn("text-xs text-muted text-center py-4", className)}>
    99→				No token data
   100→			</div>
   101→		);
   102→	}
   103→
   104→	const cursorX =
   105→		LEFT_MARGIN +
   106→		(totalMessages > 0 ? activeMessageIndex / totalMessages : 0) * drawWidth;
   107→
   108→	const barWidth = Math.max(2, (drawWidth / totalMessages) * 0.8);
   109→
   110→	return (
   111→		<div className={className}>
   112→			<div className="text-xs font-medium text-muted mb-2">Token Usage</div>
   113→
   114→			<div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-muted mb-1">
   115→				<span>In: {totalInput.toLocaleString()}</span>
   116→				<span>Out: {totalOutput.toLocaleString()}</span>
   117→			</div>
   118→
   119→			<div ref={containerRef}>
   120→				{/* biome-ignore lint/a11y/useKeyWithClickEvents: chart click navigation */}
   121→				<svg
   122→					viewBox={`0 0 ${chartWidth} ${CHART_HEIGHT}`}
   123→					className="w-full cursor-pointer"
   124→					style={{ height: `${CHART_HEIGHT}px` }}
   125→					onClick={handleClick}
   126→					role="img"
   127→					aria-label="Token usage chart showing input and output tokens per message"
   128→				>
   129→					{/* Y-axis labels */}
   130→					<text
   131→						x={LEFT_MARGIN - 4}
   132→						y={10}
   133→						textAnchor="end"

{"parentUuid":"08183692-d8ed-4a50-88a8-4007bcf6c2c2","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
     2→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
     3→
     4→export interface ToolActivityPoint {
     5→	messageIndex: number;
     6→	category: "tool" | "skill" | "subagent";
     7→	name: string;
     8→	isError: boolean;
     9→}
    10→
    11→interface ToolActivityChartProps {
    12→	data: ToolActivityPoint[];
    13→	totalMessages: number;
    14→	activeMessageIndex: number;
    15→	onClickMessage: (messageIndex: number) => void;
    16→	className?: string;
    17→}
    18→
    19→const CHART_HEIGHT = 100;
    20→const LANE_HEIGHT = 28;
    21→const LANE_TOP_PAD = 8;
    22→const DOT_RADIUS = 4;
    23→const LEFT_MARGIN = 40; // match token chart
    24→
    25→const lanes: {
    26→	category: ToolActivityPoint["category"];
    27→	label: string;
    28→	y: number;
    29→}[] = [
    30→	{ category: "tool", label: "Tools", y: LANE_TOP_PAD + LANE_HEIGHT * 0.5 },
    31→	{ category: "skill", label: "Skills", y: LANE_TOP_PAD + LANE_HEIGHT * 1.5 },
    32→	{
    33→		category: "subagent",
    34→		label: "Agents",
    35→		y: LANE_TOP_PAD + LANE_HEIGHT * 2.5,
    36→	},
    37→];
    38→
    39→export function ToolActivityChart({
    40→	data,
    41→	totalMessages,
    42→	activeMessageIndex,
    43→	onClickMessage,
    44→	className,
    45→}: ToolActivityChartProps) {
    46→	const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
    47→	const [chartWidth, setChartWidth] = useState(400);
    48→
    49→	useEffect(() => {
    50→		const el = containerRef.current;
    51→		if (!el) return;
    52→		const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
    53→			const entry = entries[0];
    54→			if (entry) setChartWidth(entry.contentRect.width);
    55→		});
    56→		observer.observe(el);
    57→		return () => observer.disconnect();
    58→	}, []);
    59→
    60→	const drawWidth = chartWidth - LEFT_MARGIN;
    61→
    62→	const counts = useMemo(() => {
    63→		const tools = data.filter((d) => d.category === "tool").length;
    64→		const skills = data.filter((d) => d.category === "skill").length;
    65→		const subagents = data.filter((d) => d.category === "subagent").length;
    66→		const errors = data.filter((d) => d.isError).length;
    67→		return { tools, skills, subagents, errors };
    68→	}, [data]);
    69→
    70→	const handleClick = useCallback(
    71→		(e: React.MouseEvent<SVGSVGElement>) => {
    72→			if (totalMessages === 0 || data.length === 0) return;
    73→
    74→			const svg = e.currentTarget;
    75→			const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
    76→			const px = e.clientX - rect.left - LEFT_MARGIN;
    77→			const fraction = px / drawWidth;
    78→
    79→			let closest = data[0];
    80→			let closestDist = Infinity;
    81→			for (const d of data) {
    82→				const dx = Math.abs(d.messageIndex / totalMessages - fraction);
    83→				if (dx < closestDist) {
    84→					closestDist = dx;
    85→					closest = d;
    86→				}
    87→			}
    88→			if (closest) {
    89→				onClickMessage(closest.messageIndex);
    90→			}
    91→		},
    92→		[data, totalMessages, drawWidth, onClickMessage],
    93→	);
    94→
    95→	if (data.length === 0) {

    98→				No tool activity
    99→			</div>
   100→		);
   101→	}
   102→
   103→	const cursorX =
   104→		LEFT_MARGIN +
   105→		(totalMessages > 0 ? activeMessageIndex / totalMessages : 0) * drawWidth;
   106→

   110→
   111→			<div className="flex gap-3 text-[10px] text-muted mb-1">

   116→					<span className="text-red-400">{counts.errors} errors</span>
   117→				)}
   118→			</div>
   119→

   124→					className="w-full cursor-pointer"
   125→					style={{ height: `${CHART_HEIGHT}px` }}
   126→					onClick={handleClick}
   127→					role="img"
   128→					aria-label="Tool activity chart showing tool, skill, and subagent usage"
   129→				>
   130→					{/* Lane labels + separators */}
   131→					{lanes.map((lane, idx) => (
   132→						<g key={lane.category}>
   133→							<line
   134→								x1={LEFT_MARGIN}
   135→								y1={LANE_TOP_PAD + idx * LANE_HEIGHT}
   136→								x2={chartWidth}
   137→								y2={LANE_TOP_PAD + idx * LANE_HEIGHT}
   138→								stroke="currentColor"
   139→								strokeWidth="0.5"
   140→								className="text-border"
   141→							/>
   142→							<text
   143→								x={LEFT_MARGIN - 4}
   144→								y={lane.y + 3}
   145→								textAnchor="end"
   146→								className="fill-muted"
   147→								fontSize="9"
   148→							>
   149→								{lane.label}
   150→							</text>
   151→						</g>
   152→					))}
   153→					{/* Bottom border */}
   154→					<line
   155→						x1={LEFT_MARGIN}
   156→						y1={LANE_TOP_PAD + lanes.length * LANE_HEIGHT}
   157→						x2={chartWidth}
   158→						y2={LANE_TOP_PAD + lanes.length * LANE_HEIGHT}
   159→						stroke="currentColor"
   160→						strokeWidth="0.5"
   161→						className="text-border"
   162→					/>
   163→
   164→					{/* Activity dots */}
   165→					{data.map((d, i) => {
   166→						const x =
   167→							LEFT_MARGIN + (d.messageIndex / totalMessages) * drawWidth;
   168→						const lane = lanes.find((l) => l.category === d.category);
   169→						if (!lane) return null;
   170→
   171→						return (
   172→							<circle
   173→								// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noArrayIndexKey: static chart dot data
   174→								key={i}
   175→								cx={x}
   176→								cy={lane.y}
   177→								r={DOT_RADIUS}
   178→								className={
   179→									d.isError
   180→										? "fill-red-400/80 hover:fill-red-500"
   181→										: d.category === "tool"
   182→											? "fill-green-400/80 hover:fill-green-500"
   183→											: d.category === "skill"
   184→												? "fill-purple-400/80 hover:fill-purple-500"
   185→												: "fill-orange-400/80 hover:fill-orange-500"
   186→								}
   187→							/>
   188→						);
   189→					})}
   190→
   191→					{/* Cursor line */}
   192→					<line
   193→						x1={cursorX}
   194→						y1="0"
   195→						x2={cursorX}
   196→						y2={CHART_HEIGHT}
   197→						stroke="currentColor"
   198→						strokeWidth="1"
   199→						className="text-foreground"
   200→						strokeDasharray="4,2"
   201→					/>
   202→				</svg>
   203→			</div>
   204→
   205→			{/* Legend */}
   206→			<div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-1.5 text-[10px] text-muted">

   208→					<div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
   209→					<span>Tools</span>
   210→				</div>
   211→				<div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   212→					<div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-purple-400" />
   213→					<span>Skills</span>
   214→				</div>

   217→					<span>Subagents</span>

   224→		</div>
   225→	);
   226→}

    10→interface DateRangeContextType {
    11→	startDate: string;
    12→	endDate: string;
    13→	setStartDate: (date: string) => void;
    14→	setEndDate: (date: string) => void;
    15→	calculateDays: () => number;
    16→}
    17→
    18→const DateRangeContext = createContext<DateRangeContextType | undefined>(
    19→	undefined,
    20→);
    21→
    22→const STORAGE_KEY = "dateRange";
    23→
    24→const getDefaultDates = () => {
    25→	const end = new Date();
    26→	const start = new Date();
    27→	start.setDate(start.getDate() - 7);
    28→	return {
    29→		start: start.toISOString().split("T")[0],
    30→		end: end.toISOString().split("T")[0],
    31→	};
    32→};
    33→
    34→const getInitialDates = (searchParams: URLSearchParams) => {
    35→	const fromParam = searchParams.get("from");
    36→	const toParam = searchParams.get("to");
    37→	if (fromParam && toParam) {
    38→		return { start: fromParam, end: toParam };
    39→	}
    40→
    41→	try {
    42→		const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    43→		if (stored) {
    44→			const parsed = JSON.parse(stored);
    45→			if (parsed.start && parsed.end) {
    46→				return parsed;
    47→			}
    48→		}
    49→	} catch {
    50→		// Ignore localStorage errors
    51→	}
    52→
    53→	return getDefaultDates();
    54→};
    55→
    56→export function DateRangeProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
    57→	const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();
    58→
    59→	const initialDates = getInitialDates(searchParams);
    60→	const [startDate, setStartDateInternal] = useState(initialDates.start);
    61→	const [endDate, setEndDateInternal] = useState(initialDates.end);
    62→	const [isInitialized, setIsInitialized] = useState(false);
    63→
    64→	useEffect(() => {
    65→		const dates = getInitialDates(searchParams);
    66→		setStartDateInternal(dates.start);
    67→		setEndDateInternal(dates.end);
    68→		setIsInitialized(true);
    69→	}, [searchParams]);
    70→
    71→	useEffect(() => {
    72→		if (!isInitialized) return;
    73→
    74→		try {
    75→			localStorage.setItem(
    76→				STORAGE_KEY,
    77→				JSON.stringify({ start: startDate, end: endDate }),
    78→			);
    79→		} catch {
    80→			// Ignore localStorage errors
    81→		}
    82→
    83→		setSearchParams(
    84→			(prev) => {
    85→				prev.set("from", startDate);
    86→				prev.set("to", endDate);
    87→				return prev;
    88→			},
    89→			{ replace: true },
    90→		);
    91→	}, [startDate, endDate, isInitialized, setSearchParams]);
    92→
    93→	const setStartDate = (date: string) => {
    94→		setStartDateInternal(date);
    95→	};
    96→
    97→	const setEndDate = (date: string) => {
    98→		setEndDateInternal(date);
    99→	};
   100→
   101→	const calculateDays = () => {
   102→		const startTime = new Date(startDate).getTime();
   103→		const endTime = new Date(endDate).getTime();
   104→		return Math.ceil((endTime - startTime) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   105→	};
   106→
   107→	return (
   108→		<DateRangeContext.Provider
   109→			value={{
   110→				startDate,
   111→				endDate,
   112→				setStartDate,
   113→				setEndDate,
   114→				calculateDays,
   115→			}}
   116→		>
   117→			{children}
   118→		</DateRangeContext.Provider>
   119→	);
   120→}
   121→
   122→export function useDateRange() {
   123→	const context = useContext(DateRangeContext);
   124→	if (context === undefined) {
   125→		throw new Error("useDateRange must be used within a DateRangeProvider");
   126→	}
   127→	return context;
   128→}

     8→import { useSearchParams } from "react-router-dom";
     9→
    10→interface FilterContextType {
    11→	selectedDevelopers: string[];
    12→	selectedRepositories: string[];
    13→	setSelectedDevelopers: (developers: string[]) => void;
    14→	setSelectedRepositories: (repositories: string[]) => void;
    15→	clearAllFilters: () => void;
    16→	hasActiveFilters: boolean;
    17→}
    18→
    19→const FilterContext = createContext<FilterContextType | undefined>(undefined);
    20→
    21→const STORAGE_KEY = "globalFilters";
    22→
    23→const getInitialFilters = (searchParams: URLSearchParams) => {
    24→	const devsParam = searchParams.get("devs");
    25→	const reposParam = searchParams.get("repos");
    26→
    27→	if (devsParam || reposParam) {
    28→		return {
    29→			developers: devsParam ? devsParam.split(",").filter(Boolean) : [],
    30→			repositories: reposParam ? reposParam.split(",").filter(Boolean) : [],
    31→		};
    32→	}
    33→
    34→	try {
    35→		const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
    36→		if (stored) {
    37→			const parsed = JSON.parse(stored);
    38→			return {
    39→				developers: parsed.developers || [],
    40→				repositories: parsed.repositories || [],
    41→			};
    42→		}
    43→	} catch {
    44→		// Ignore localStorage errors
    45→	}
    46→
    47→	return {
    48→		developers: [],
    49→		repositories: [],
    50→	};
    51→};
    52→
    53→export function FilterProvider({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
    54→	const [searchParams, setSearchParams] = useSearchParams();
    55→
    56→	const initialFilters = getInitialFilters(searchParams);
    57→	const [selectedDevelopers, setSelectedDevelopersInternal] = useState<
    58→		string[]
    59→	>(initialFilters.developers);
    60→	const [selectedRepositories, setSelectedRepositoriesInternal] = useState<
    61→		string[]
    62→	>(initialFilters.repositories);
    63→	const [isInitialized, setIsInitialized] = useState(false);
    64→
    65→	useEffect(() => {
    66→		const filters = getInitialFilters(searchParams);
    67→		setSelectedDevelopersInternal(filters.developers);
    68→		setSelectedRepositoriesInternal(filters.repositories);
    69→		setIsInitialized(true);
    70→	}, [searchParams]);
    71→
    72→	useEffect(() => {
    73→		if (!isInitialized) return;
    74→
    75→		try {
    76→			localStorage.setItem(
    77→				STORAGE_KEY,
    78→				JSON.stringify({
    79→					developers: selectedDevelopers,
    80→					repositories: selectedRepositories,
    81→				}),
    82→			);
    83→		} catch {
    84→			// Ignore localStorage errors
    85→		}
    86→
    87→		setSearchParams(
    88→			(prev) => {
    89→				if (selectedDevelopers.length > 0) {
    90→					prev.set("devs", selectedDevelopers.join(","));
    91→				} else {
    92→					prev.delete("devs");
    93→				}
    94→
    95→				if (selectedRepositories.length > 0) {
    96→					prev.set("repos", selectedRepositories.join(","));
    97→				} else {
    98→					prev.delete("repos");
    99→				}
   100→
   101→				return prev;
   102→			},
   103→			{ replace: true },
   104→		);
   105→	}, [
   106→		selectedDevelopers,
   107→		selectedRepositories,
   108→		isInitialized,
   109→		setSearchParams,
   110→	]);
   111→
   112→	const setSelectedDevelopers = (developers: string[]) => {
   113→		setSelectedDevelopersInternal(developers);
   114→	};
   115→
   116→	const setSelectedRepositories = (repositories: string[]) => {
   117→		setSelectedRepositoriesInternal(repositories);
   118→	};
   119→
   120→	const clearAllFilters = () => {
   121→		setSelectedDevelopersInternal([]);
   122→		setSelectedRepositoriesInternal([]);
   123→	};
   124→
   125→	const hasActiveFilters =
   126→		selectedDevelopers.length > 0 || selectedRepositories.length > 0;
   127→
   128→	return (
   129→		<FilterContext.Provider
   130→			value={{
   131→				selectedDevelopers,
   132→				selectedRepositories,
   133→				setSelectedDevelopers,
   134→				setSelectedRepositories,
   135→				clearAllFilters,
   136→				hasActiveFilters,
   137→			}}
   138→		>
   139→			{children}
   140→		</FilterContext.Provider>
   141→	);
   142→}
   143→
   144→export function useFilters() {
   145→	const context = useContext(FilterContext);
   146→	if (context === undefined) {
   147→		throw new Error("useFilters must be used within a FilterProvider");
   148→	}
   149→	return context;

{"parentUuid":"712108db-3cad-4136-a281-d182f2a4220e","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { z } from "zod";
     2→
     3→// ── Content block schemas ──────────────────────────────────────────
     4→
     5→export const TextContentSchema = z.object({
     6→	type: z.literal("text"),
     7→	text: z.string(),
     8→});
     9→
    10→export const ThinkingContentSchema = z.object({
    11→	type: z.literal("thinking"),
    12→	thinking: z.string(),
    13→});
    14→
    15→export const ToolUseContentSchema = z.object({
    16→	type: z.literal("tool_use"),
    17→	id: z.string(),
    18→	name: z.string(),
    19→	input: z.record(z.string(), z.any()),
    20→});
    21→
    22→export const ToolResultContentSchema = z.object({
    23→	type: z.literal("tool_result"),
    24→	tool_use_id: z.string(),
    25→	content: z.union([
    26→		z.string(),
    27→		z.array(
    28→			z.object({
    29→				type: z.string(),
    30→				text: z.string().optional(),
    31→				source: z.any().optional(),
    32→			}),
    33→		),
    34→	]),
    35→	is_error: z.boolean().optional(),
    36→});
    37→
    38→export const ContentSchema = z.union([
    39→	TextContentSchema,
    40→	ThinkingContentSchema,
    41→	ToolUseContentSchema,
    42→	ToolResultContentSchema,
    43→]);
    44→
    45→// ── Role-based entry schemas ───────────────────────────────────────
    46→
    47→export const UserEntrySchema = z.object({
    48→	role: z.literal("user"),
    49→	content: z.union([z.string(), z.array(ContentSchema)]),
    50→	timestamp: z.string().optional(),
    51→});
    52→
    53→export const AssistantEntrySchema = z.object({
    54→	role: z.literal("assistant"),
    55→	content: z.union([z.string(), z.array(ContentSchema)]),
    56→	timestamp: z.string().optional(),
    57→});
    58→
    59→export const SummaryEntrySchema = z.object({
    60→	role: z.literal("summary"),
    61→	summary: z.string(),
    62→	timestamp: z.string().optional(),
    63→});
    64→
    65→export const SystemEntrySchema = z.object({
    66→	role: z.literal("system"),
    67→	content: z.string(),
    68→	timestamp: z.string().optional(),
    69→});
    70→
    71→// ── Type-based entry schemas (alternative format from ClickHouse) ──
    72→
    73→export const TypeUserEntrySchema = z
    74→	.object({
    75→		type: z.literal("user"),
    76→		message: z
    77→			.object({
    78→				content: z.union([z.string(), z.array(ContentSchema)]),
    79→			})
    80→			.passthrough()
    81→			.optional(),
    82→		content: z.union([z.string(), z.array(ContentSchema)]).optional(),
    83→		timestamp: z.string().optional(),
    84→	})
    85→	.passthrough();
    86→
    87→export const TypeAssistantEntrySchema = z
    88→	.object({
    89→		type: z.literal("assistant"),
    90→		message: z
    91→			.object({
    92→				content: z.union([z.string(), z.array(ContentSchema)]),
    93→			})
    94→			.passthrough()
    95→			.optional(),
    96→		content: z.union([z.string(), z.array(ContentSchema)]).optional(),
    97→		timestamp: z.string().optional(),
    98→	})
    99→	.passthrough();
   100→
   101→export const TypeSystemEntrySchema = z
   102→	.object({
   103→		type: z.literal("system"),
   104→		content: z.string().optional(),
   105→		text: z.string().optional(),
   106→		timestamp: z.string().optional(),
   107→	})
   108→	.passthrough();
   109→
   110→export const ProgressEntrySchema = z
   111→	.object({
   112→		type: z.literal("progress"),
   113→	})
   114→	.passthrough();
   115→
   116→export const GenericEntrySchema = z
   117→	.object({
   118→		type: z.string(),
   119→		messageId: z.string().optional(),
   120→	})
   121→	.passthrough();
   122→
   123→// ── Conversation entry union ───────────────────────────────────────
   124→
   125→export const ConversationSchema = z.union([
   126→	// Role-based entries (original format)
   127→	UserEntrySchema,
   128→	AssistantEntrySchema,
   129→	SummaryEntrySchema,
   130→	SystemEntrySchema,
   131→	// Type-based entries (actual format from ClickHouse)
   132→	TypeUserEntrySchema,
   133→	TypeAssistantEntrySchema,
   134→	TypeSystemEntrySchema,
   135→	ProgressEntrySchema,
   136→	// Fallback for other types
   137→	GenericEntrySchema,
   138→]);
   139→
   140→// ── Type exports ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   141→
   142→export type TextContent = z.infer<typeof TextContentSchema>;
   143→export type ThinkingContent = z.infer<typeof ThinkingContentSchema>;
   144→export type ToolUseContent = z.infer<typeof ToolUseContentSchema>;
   145→export type ToolResultContent = z.infer<typeof ToolResultContentSchema>;
   146→export type Content = z.infer<typeof ContentSchema>;
   147→export type UserEntry = z.infer<typeof UserEntrySchema>;
   148→export type AssistantEntry = z.infer<typeof AssistantEntrySchema>;
   149→export type SummaryEntry = z.infer<typeof SummaryEntrySchema>;
   150→export type SystemEntry = z.infer<typeof SystemEntrySchema>;
   151→export type TypeUserEntry = z.infer<typeof TypeUserEntrySchema>;
   152→export type TypeAssistantEntry = z.infer<typeof TypeAssistantEntrySchema>;
   153→export type TypeSystemEntry = z.infer<typeof TypeSystemEntrySchema>;
   154→export type ProgressEntry = z.infer<typeof ProgressEntrySchema>;
   155→export type GenericEntry = z.infer<typeof GenericEntrySchema>;
   156→export type ConversationEntry = z.infer<typeof ConversationSchema>;
   157→
   158→// ── Parser ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   159→
   160→/**
   161→ * Parse JSONL conversation content into structured conversation entries
   162→ */
   163→export function parseConversations(content: string): ConversationEntry[] {
   164→	if (!content || content.trim() === "") {
   165→		return [];
   166→	}
   167→
   168→	const lines = content.split("\n").filter((line) => line.trim() !== "");
   169→	const conversations: ConversationEntry[] = [];
   170→	let successCount = 0;
   171→	let failCount = 0;
   172→
   173→	for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
   174→		const line = lines[i] as string;
   175→		try {
   176→			const json: unknown = JSON.parse(line);
   177→			const parsed = ConversationSchema.safeParse(json);
   178→
   179→			if (parsed.success) {
   180→				conversations.push(parsed.data);
   181→				successCount++;
   182→			} else {
   183→				failCount++;
   184→				if (failCount <= 3) {
   185→					console.warn(
   186→						`[parseConversations] Line ${i + 1} failed validation:`,
   187→						{
   188→							role: (json as Record<string, unknown>)?.role,
   189→							errors: parsed.error.issues,
   190→							sample: JSON.stringify(json).slice(0, 200),
   191→						},
   192→					);
   193→				}
   194→			}
   195→		} catch (error) {
   196→			failCount++;
   197→			if (failCount <= 3) {
   198→				console.warn(
   199→					`[parseConversations] Line ${i + 1} JSON parse error:`,
   200→					error,
   201→				);
   202→				console.warn(
   203→					`[parseConversations] Line content sample:`,
   204→					line.slice(0, 200),
   205→				);
   206→			}
   207→		}
   208→	}
   209→
   210→	if (conversations.length > 0) {
   211→		const entryTypes: Record<string, number> = {};
   212→		const roleTypes: Record<string, number> = {};
   213→
   214→		for (const entry of conversations) {
   215→			if ("type" in entry) {
   216→				const type = (entry as Record<string, unknown>).type as string;
   217→				entryTypes[type] = (entryTypes[type] || 0) + 1;
   218→			}
   219→			if ("role" in entry) {
   220→				const role = (entry as Record<string, unknown>).role as string;
   221→				roleTypes[role] = (roleTypes[role] || 0) + 1;
   222→			}
   223→		}
   224→
   225→		console.log(
   226→			`[parseConversations] Parsed ${successCount} entries, ${failCount} failed out of ${lines.length} lines`,
   227→		);
   228→		console.log(`[parseConversations] Entry types found:`, entryTypes);
   229→		console.log(`[parseConversations] Role types found:`, roleTypes);
   230→	} else {
   231→		console.log(
   232→			`[parseConversations] Parsed ${successCount} entries, ${failCount} failed out of ${lines.length} lines`,
   233→		);
   234→	}
   235→
   236→	return conversations;
   237→}
   238→"}]},"uuid":"a2d1505a-fb78-44a9-9f6a-b884e743abb1","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:26:07.438Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"712108db-3cad-4136-a281-d182f2a4220e"}

{"parentUuid":"7bcef27c-1d37-49a3-9727-bb68181f48e4","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014bLJFMLZymZMWqnxHeHoRV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→export function formatRelativeTime(dateString: string): string {
     2→	const normalizedDate = dateString.endsWith("Z")
     3→		? dateString
     4→		: `${dateString}Z`;
     5→	const date = new Date(normalizedDate);
     6→	const now = new Date();
     7→
     8→	const diffMs = now.getTime() - date.getTime();
     9→	const diffSec = Math.floor(diffMs / 1000);
    10→	const diffMin = Math.floor(diffSec / 60);
    11→	const diffHour = Math.floor(diffMin / 60);
    12→	const diffDay = Math.floor(diffHour / 24);
    13→
    14→	if (diffSec < 60) {
    15→		return "just now";
    16→	}
    17→	if (diffMin < 60) {
    18→		return `${diffMin}m ago`;
    19→	}
    20→	if (diffHour < 24) {
    21→		return `${diffHour}h ago`;
    22→	}
    23→	if (diffDay < 7) {
    24→		return `${diffDay}d ago`;
    25→	}
    26→
    27→	return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
    28→		month: "short",
    29→		day: "numeric",
    30→		year: date.getFullYear() !== now.getFullYear() ? "numeric" : undefined,
    31→	});
    32→}
    33→"}]},"uuid":"34a4b642-5678-443e-b276-78442d326174","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:26:08.455Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"7bcef27c-1d37-49a3-9727-bb68181f48e4"}

{"parentUuid":"942e66bb-d8b3-4256-8251-290c84ca8669","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**
     2→ * Parse slash command XML tags from user messages
     3→ */
     4→
     5→export interface SlashCommandInfo {
     6→	commandMessage: string;
     7→	commandName: string;
     8→	commandArgs: string;
     9→}
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * Check if a user message contains slash command tags
    13→ */
    14→export function isSlashCommandMessage(content: string): boolean {
    15→	return (
    16→		content.includes("<command-message>") ||
    17→		content.includes("<command-name>") ||
    18→		content.includes("<command-args>")
    19→	);
    20→}
    21→
    22→/**
    23→ * Extract slash command information from message content
    24→ */
    25→export function parseSlashCommand(content: string): SlashCommandInfo | null {
    26→	const commandMessageMatch = content.match(
    27→		/<command-message>([\s\S]*?)<\/command-message>/,
    28→	);
    29→	const commandNameMatch = content.match(

{"parentUuid":"e8ca0881-7f98-46e2-9482-acad0abc0834","isSidechain":true,"userType":"external","cwd":"/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown","sessionId":"3ffa92f1-f851-4034-9876-eaf45ddd1129","version":"2.1.45","gitBranch":"marc/num-6491-build-single-session-view","agentId":"acdbde7","slug":"snoopy-purring-ember","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"REDACTED","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
     2→import { Link, useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
     3→
     4→const segmentLabels: Record<string, string> = {
     5→	dashboard: "Overview",
     6→	developers: "Developers",
     7→	projects: "Projects",
     8→	roi: "ROI & Business Value",
     9→	sessions: "Sessions",
    10→	learnings: "Learnings",
    11→	errors: "Errors",
    12→	profile: "Profile",
    13→};
    14→
    15→export function Breadcrumb() {
    16→	const { pathname } = useLocation();
    17→	const segments = pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean);
    18→
    19→	const crumbs = segments.map((segment, index) => {
    20→		const href = `/${segments.slice(0, index + 1).join("/")}`;
    21→		const label = segmentLabels[segment] || decodeURIComponent(segment);
    22→		const isLast = index === segments.length - 1;
    23→
    24→		return { href, label, isLast };
    25→	});
    26→
    27→	return (
    28→		<nav className="flex shrink-0 items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted h-10 px-8 bg-surface border-b border-border">
    29→			{crumbs.map((crumb, index) => (
    30→				<span key={crumb.href} className="flex items-center gap-1">
    31→					{index > 0 && <ChevronRight className="h-3 w-3" />}
    32→					{crumb.isLast ? (
    33→						<span className="text-subheading">{crumb.label}</span>
    34→					) : (
    35→						<Link
    36→							to={crumb.href}
    37→							className="hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
    38→						>
    39→							{crumb.label}
    40→						</Link>
    41→					)}
    42→				</span>
    43→			))}
    44→		</nav>
    45→	);
    46→}
    47→"}]},"uuid":"5cb8fd8a-1a65-4397-a561-7ddcaa2ff597","timestamp":"2026-02-24T00:26:14.743Z","sourceToolAssistantUUID":"e8ca0881-7f98-46e2-9482-acad0abc0834"}

   100→							linkLabel="Go to sessions"

     2→import { Link } from "react-router-dom";

     4→import { AnalyticsCard } from "./AnalyticsCard";
     5→
     6→interface StatCardProps {
     7→	title: string;
     8→	value: string | number;
     9→	subtitle?: string;
    10→	icon?: LucideIcon;
    11→	trend?: {
    12→		value: number;
    13→		label?: string;
    14→	};
    15→	iconColor?: string;
    16→	href?: string;
    17→	linkLabel?: string;
    18→}
    19→
    20→export function StatCard({
    21→	title,
    22→	value,
    23→	icon: Icon,
    24→	trend,
    25→	iconColor = "text-blue-600",
    26→	href,
    27→	linkLabel,
    28→}: StatCardProps) {
    29→	return (
    30→		<AnalyticsCard className="!p-4">
    31→			<div className="flex items-start justify-between">

    35→					{trend && (
    36→						<div className="flex items-center mt-1">
    37→							<span
    38→								className={cn(
    39→									"text-xs font-medium",
    40→									trend.value >= 0
    41→										? "text-status-success-icon"
    42→										: "text-status-error-icon",
    43→								)}
    44→							>
    45→								{trend.value >= 0 ? "\u2191" : "\u2193"}{" "}
    46→								{Math.abs(trend.value).toFixed(1)}%
    47→							</span>
    48→						</div>

    51→				<div className="flex flex-col items-end gap-1 shrink-0">
    52→					{Icon && (

    54→							<Icon className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
    55→						</div>
    56→					)}
    57→					{href && (
    58→						<Link
    59→							to={href}
    60→							className="text-[11px] text-muted hover:text-heading transition-colors whitespace-nowrap"
    61→						>
    62→							{linkLabel || "Details"} →
    63→						</Link>

## Analysis: Rudel Web App (`apps/web/src/`)

### Overview

The Rudel web app is a React 19 SPA built with Vite, using react-router-dom v7 for routing, TanStack Query v5 for server state, and `@orpc/client` + `@orpc/tanstack-query` for typed RPC calls to the API. Authentication is handled by `better-auth/react`. The app is a full analytics dashboard for Claude Code session transcripts, with a session detail page that includes a complete conversation viewer.

### Directory Structure

```
apps/web/src/
  main.tsx                          -- App bootstrap (providers, router)
  App.tsx                           -- Route definitions + auth gate
  index.css                         -- Tailwind CSS entry

  layouts/
    DashboardLayout.tsx             -- Sidebar + breadcrumb + outlet shell

  pages/dashboard/
    OverviewPage.tsx                -- KPIs, usage trends, model tokens, insights
    DevelopersListPage.tsx           -- Developer list + trends
    DeveloperDetailPage.tsx         -- Single developer deep-dive
    ProjectsListPage.tsx            -- Project investment list + trends
    ProjectDetailPage.tsx           -- Single project deep-dive
    SessionsListPage.tsx            -- Session list + dimension analysis
    SessionDetailPage.tsx           -- Single session detail + conversation viewer
    ROIPage.tsx                     -- ROI metrics + trends + cost breakdown
    ErrorsPage.tsx                  -- Recurring errors + error trends
    LearningsPage.tsx               -- Learnings feed + stats
    ProfilePage.tsx                 -- User profile + social linking

  components/
    analytics/
      AnalyticsCard.tsx             -- Generic card wrapper
      Breadcrumb.tsx                -- Path-based breadcrumb navigation
      DatePicker.tsx                -- Date range picker
      InsightCard.tsx               -- Insight display card
      MultiSelect.tsx               -- Multi-select dropdown
      PageHeader.tsx                -- Page title + description + actions
      Sidebar.tsx                   -- Left nav with collapsible sidebar
      StatCard.tsx                  -- KPI stat card with trend indicator
      ThemeToggle.tsx               -- Light/dark theme switcher

    auth/
      login-form.tsx                -- Email/password + GitHub OAuth login
      signup-form.tsx               -- Email/password signup

    charts/
      DeveloperTrendChart.tsx       -- Developer-level trend chart
      DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx    -- Multi-dimensional bar chart
      ErrorTrendChart.tsx           -- Error trend line chart
      LearningsTrendChart.tsx       -- Learnings trend chart
      ModelTokensChart.tsx          -- Token usage by model chart
      ProjectTrendChart.tsx         -- Project-level trend chart
      TaskClassificationChart.tsx   -- Task type classification chart
      UsageTrendChart.tsx           -- Overall usage trend chart

    conversation/
      ConversationView.tsx          -- Top-level conversation parser/renderer
      ConversationMessage.tsx       -- Individual message renderer
      MessageContent.tsx            -- Content block renderer (text, code, tools)
      CodeBlock.tsx                 -- Syntax-highlighted code block
      ToolInvocation.tsx            -- Expandable tool use display
      TokenUsageChart.tsx           -- Custom SVG token usage sparkline
      ToolActivityChart.tsx         -- Custom SVG tool activity lane chart

    learnings/
      LearningsTimeline.tsx         -- Learnings timeline view

    ui/
      avatar.tsx                    -- Radix UI Avatar (shadcn)

      input.tsx                     -- Input component (shadcn)
      label.tsx                     -- Label component (shadcn)
      separator.tsx                 -- Separator component (shadcn)

  contexts/
    DateRangeContext.tsx             -- Global date range state (URL + localStorage)
    FilterContext.tsx                -- Global developer/repo filter state

  hooks/
    useChartTheme.ts                -- Theme-aware chart colors

  providers/
    ThemeProvider.tsx                -- next-themes wrapper

  lib/
    auth-client.ts                  -- better-auth client
    orpc.ts                         -- @orpc typed RPC client + TanStack Query utils
    analytics.ts                    -- Statistical helper functions
    conversation-schema.ts          -- Zod schemas + JSONL parser for conversation data
    format.ts                       -- Cost calculation, username formatting
    parse-slash-command.ts          -- Slash command XML tag parser
    time-utils.ts                   -- Relative time formatting
    utils.ts                        -- cn() tailwind merge utility
```

### 1. Routing Setup

**Technology**: `react-router-dom` v7.13.0 (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/package.json:27`)

**Bootstrap** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/main.tsx:1-22`):
The app is wrapped in four providers, in this nesting order:
1. `StrictMode` (line 13)
2. `QueryClientProvider` from TanStack Query with a default `QueryClient` (lines 9, 14)
3. `BrowserRouter` from react-router-dom (line 15)
4. `ThemeProvider` wrapping `next-themes` (line 16)

**Route Definitions** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/App.tsx:81-98`):

Routes are only rendered when the user has an active session (the `!session` check on line 69 shows auth forms instead). The route tree:

| Path | Component | Type |
|------|-----------|------|
| `/` | `Navigate to /dashboard` | Redirect |
| `/dashboard` | `DashboardLayout` | Layout (with `<Outlet />`) |
| `/dashboard` (index) | `OverviewPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/developers` | `DevelopersListPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/developers/:userId` | `DeveloperDetailPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/projects` | `ProjectsListPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/projects/:projectPath` | `ProjectDetailPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/sessions` | `SessionsListPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/sessions/:sessionId` | `SessionDetailPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/roi` | `ROIPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/errors` | `ErrorsPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/learnings` | `LearningsPage` | Page |
| `/dashboard/profile` | `ProfilePage` | Page |
| `*` (catch-all) | `Navigate to /dashboard` | Redirect |

**Authentication Gate** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/App.tsx:35-99`):
The `App` component calls `authClient.useSession()` (line 36) and renders:
- A loading spinner while `isPending` is true (lines 53-59)
- A CLI redirect flow when `cliParams` are present and the user is logged in (lines 41-51, 61-67). It fetches `/api/cli-token`, then redirects the browser to the CLI callback URL with the token.
- Login/Signup forms when there is no session (lines 69-79). The forms toggle via local `page` state.
- The full route tree when an authenticated session exists (lines 81-98).

---

### 2. Layout Structure

**DashboardLayout** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx:1-23`):

Wraps content in two context providers:
1. `DateRangeProvider` (line 9) -- provides global date range state
2. `FilterProvider` (line 10) -- provides global developer/repository filter state

The layout is a horizontal flex container (`flex h-screen overflow-hidden`):
- **Left**: `<Sidebar />` -- collapsible navigation sidebar
- **Right**: A vertical flex column containing:
  - `<Breadcrumb />` -- path-aware breadcrumb bar (40px height)
  - `<main>` with `<Outlet />` -- page content fills remaining space

**Sidebar** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/components/analytics/Sidebar.tsx:22-196`):

The sidebar has 7 navigation items defined at lines 22-34 (Overview, Developers, Projects, ROI & Business Value, Sessions, Learnings, Errors). It is collapsible via local state (line 48), toggling between `w-64` and `w-14`. Active route highlighting compares `pathname === item.href` (line 68). When collapsed, tooltip labels appear on hover (lines 91-95).

The sidebar footer (lines 137-193) displays the authenticated user's avatar, name, a sign-out button, a theme toggle, and the collapse/expand toggle.

**Breadcrumb** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/components/analytics/Breadcrumb.tsx:1-47`):

Splits the current pathname by `/` and maps each segment to a human-readable label via the `segmentLabels` record (lines 4-13). Dynamic segments (like `:sessionId`) fall through to `decodeURIComponent(segment)` (line 21). The last breadcrumb segment is rendered as plain text; others are `<Link>` elements.

---

### 3. UI Components (shadcn/ui)

Six shadcn/ui primitives exist in `/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/components/ui/`:

| Component | File | Based On |
|-----------|------|----------|
| `Avatar` | `avatar.tsx` | Radix UI Avatar with `size` variants (sm/default/lg) |
| `Button` | `button.tsx` | CVA-based button with 6 variants + 8 size options |
| `Card` | `card.tsx` | Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction, CardContent, CardFooter |
| `Input` | `input.tsx` | Standard input |
| `Label` | `label.tsx` | Standard label |
| `Separator` | `separator.tsx` | Standard separator |

These use the standard shadcn pattern: Radix UI primitives + `cn()` utility from `@/lib/utils` (which combines `clsx` + `tailwind-merge`).

Additionally, the app has custom analytics-specific components that serve as the primary UI building blocks:
- **`AnalyticsCard`** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/components/analytics/AnalyticsCard.tsx:9-20`) -- a simple div with `bg-input rounded-lg shadow-md border border-border p-6`.
- **`StatCard`** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/components/analytics/StatCard.tsx:20-69`) -- wraps `AnalyticsCard` with icon, value, title, optional trend indicator (up/down arrow + percentage), and optional link.

### 4. API Calls / RPC Setup

**RPC Client** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/lib/orpc.ts:1-15`):

The typed RPC client is created in three steps:
1. An `RPCLink` is configured pointing at `/rpc` on the current origin (line 8), with `credentials: "include"` for auth cookies (line 9).
2. `createORPCClient(link)` creates a typed client conforming to `ContractRouterClient<typeof contract>` (lines 12-13), where `contract` is imported from `@rudel/api-routes`.
3. `createTanstackQueryUtils(client)` creates `orpc`, which exposes `.queryOptions()` methods for each contract route (line 15).

**Vite Proxy** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/vite.config.ts:10-13`):
Both `/api` and `/rpc` prefixed requests are proxied to `http://localhost:4010` (the API server).

**Usage Pattern**: All pages use TanStack Query's `useQuery` hook with `orpc.<path>.queryOptions({ input: {...} })`. For example:

```typescript
// SessionDetailPage.tsx:72-76
const { data: session, isLoading } = useQuery(
    orpc.analytics.sessions.detail.queryOptions({
        input: { sessionId: sessionId as string },
    }),
);
```

**API Contract** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/packages/api-routes/src/index.ts:99-210`):

The contract defines these route groups with full Zod schemas:

| Group | Routes |
|-------|--------|
| `health` | Health check |
| `me` | Current user info |
| `ingestSession` | Session upload |
| `analytics.overview` | `kpis`, `usageTrend`, `modelTokensTrend`, `insights`, `teamSummaryComparison`, `successRate` |
| `analytics.developers` | `list`, `details`, `sessions`, `projects`, `timeline`, `features`, `errors`, `trends` |
| `analytics.projects` | `investment`, `trends`, `details`, `contributors`, `features`, `errors` |
| `analytics.sessions` | `list`, `summary`, `summaryComparison`, `dimensionAnalysis`, `detail` |
| `analytics.roi` | `metrics`, `trends`, `breakdownDevelopers`, `breakdownProjects` |
| `analytics.errors` | `topRecurring`, `trends` |
| `analytics.learnings` | `list`, `stats`, `users`, `projects`, `trend` |
| `analytics.users` | `mappings` |

**Auth Client** (`/Users/marc/conductor/workspaces/rudel/freetown/apps/web/src/lib/auth-client.ts:1-5`):
Uses `better-auth/react`'s `createAuthClient` with an empty `baseURL` (requests go to the same origin). Provides `authClient.useSession()` for session state and `authClient.signOut()` for logout.
